title: WWC: 2025 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo
summary: From the arena floor at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas, Word with a Champ offers ten daily 5-minute reports from the 67th Wrangler National Finals Rodeo (WNFR), December 5 – 14, 2025. Across 10 days, Word with a Champ brings listeners coverage of Native American and First Nation Canadian cont...

title: AST Disturbance: Palmer [AK25117527]
summary: On 11/23/2025 at approximately 1600 hours, the Alaska State Troopers responded to a residence near E. Porcupine for a report of a domestic disturbance. Investigation revealed James Garman, age 47, recklessly caused injury to a household member and damaged property. It was also determined James crash...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Sport fish w/o License: Palmer [AK25117474]
summary: On 11/23/2025 at approximately 1304 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers contacted Ezekiel Oswald, age 27, of Michigan, who was observed ice fishing on Matanuska Lake in Palmer. Investigation revealed that Ezekiel was in possession of 5 rainbow trout while fishing without a non-resident sport fishing lic...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Deceased Person: Kenny Lake [AK25117383]
summary: On 11/22/2025 Dennis Brown, age 85, passed away at his home in Kenny Lake. The Alaska State Troopers responded and conducted an investigation. There is no foul play suspected, and it appears Brown died of natural causes. Next of kin has been notified.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST RECKLESS DRIVING, LEAVING THE SCENE OF AN ACCIDENT: NINILCHIK [AK25117280]
incident_type: RECKLESS DRIVING, LEAVING THE SCENE OF AN ACCIDENT
summary: On 11/22/2025 at approximately 1353 hours, Alaska State Troopers in Anchor Point received a REDDI report of a dangerous driver in a newer model Chevrolet SUV that was all over the roadway, going into the oncoming lane multiple times, southbound from mile 128 of the Sterling Highway. While AST units....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: OPINION: Wyoming weighs nixing property taxes – Alaska should too
summary: Coincidentally, just after my last article on the inequity of property taxes in Alaska, the Wyoming legislature announced that it is considering eliminating them in its state. Wyoming has a population size similar to ours and charges a per capita property tax almost identical to Alaska’s, making it...

title: GOP leadership in Alaska House to change as Minority Leader steps aside
summary: Rep. Mia Costello (R-Anchorage) announced she is stepping down from her role as head of the GOP Minority Caucus in the State House, effective Nov. 22. While Costello will continue to serve her constituents in House District 15, she said the decision to hand over leadership comes after careful consid...

title: AST MICS 5, Disorderly Conduct: Meadow Lakes [AK25117357]
summary: On 11/22/2025 AST responded to a report of a welfare check in Meadow Lakes for a female passed out behind the wheel. AST contacted Desiree Clark, age 46, of Palmer. AST noted paraphernalia in the vehicle consistent with the use of methamphetamine. Desiree became uncooperative with AST’s investigatio...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Drive CMV without being Licensed: Healy [AK25117337]
summary: On 11/22/2025 at 1728 hours the Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop near Mile 248 Parks Highway in Healy for speeding on a commercial motor vehicle. Investigation determined the driver, Aifeula Moloasi, age 32 from Anchorage had a suspended driver's license. Moloasi was issued a misdemean...
